（剧情向，微慢热，纯手写无AI）

已完本185万字《星之猎杀者》，本书大纲完整，可放心追读。

——

世界上的一部分人，陷入了一个恐怖的梦，而那些有幸醒来的人，开始拥有异能。

在那个充满怪物的梦中，挺过一小时都异常艰难，但人做梦的时间越长，得到的力量就越强，极少数能坚持到天明的苏醒者，全都拥有了不可思议的“力量”。

梦只会做一次，因此，那些得到力量的人开始声称，这是一次机遇，一个考验。

于是，陆肖开始思考，这个自己连续做了三年的梦，究竟为自己带来了什么。

“我每晚在噩梦里挣扎跋涉，怎么就成了大魔王了？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/81b378837e11786300e278378c0489ee","author":"五月不雨后果自负","author_id":"","book_id":"7597790959878802494","book_name":"什么？我睡觉就能无敌？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7597790969198559806","read_count":"16026","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"360436"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"141","tags":"都市高武,都市,无敌,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f8b08f5e9b100fa99543744c74f263f7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779431324&x-signature=oWdEimnvDlCVBc%2BgBCk7oKifpJw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1841033453507724","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"83"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323142844F0395AAFB7A78CC0563D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7486,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3006},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604868834364883774","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"依旧粪海淘金中奖，本书不同于传统的快文或者爽文，不是说他们不好，而是故事表达的程度和深度无法到达，目前来看作者是想讲好一个故事，铺垫和剧情推进也非常顺利，是优质粮草。
硬要说缺点，可能是人物刻画仍有割裂，一个苦行僧般的主角，却又有了少年般的意气，这虽然是看清世界真相明白自己实力之后的自信，可谨慎与努力我认为依然还是底色。
世界观已经铺开宏大，虽然成绩不是很好，但是希望作者能继续坚持，写一个好故事[思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770648190,"group_id":"7597790959878802494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"麦门！这里是一只喜欢吃麦当劳的汉堡王（）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw5Rj+MY36Ib54I60fIiW6kqBfTuavL6JIwjx8y6ftYA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b5a51fb5968d4dfea7ccb9920da39487~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793029&x-signature=LA0F5uIZr0Ky3r1bw3WlawodnVs%3D","user_id":"1289108179657389","user_name":"金拱门守护者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1289108179657389","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597790959878802494","book_info":{"abstract":"（无系统，异能类，有剧情的无敌流）
